cards.title: Toxins, Heavy Metals & EDCs
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Heavy metal testing: Blood (acute), urine provoked (chronic)
  • Mercury: Fish sources, DMPS chelation
  • Lead: Children at risk, cognitive effects
  • EDCs: BPA, phthalates, parabens — avoidance strategies
  • PFAS: Emerging evidence, filtration required

cards.title: Detox Pathways & Treatment
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Phase I: CYP450 enzymes, B vitamins, antioxidants
  • Phase II: Glucuronidation, sulphation, glutathione conjugation
  • Air quality: AQI interpretation, HEPA filtration
  • Pesticide detox: Organic food priority list (Dirty Dozen)
  • Mould/CIRS: Shoemaker protocol overview
